channel.title: Curl on meorion
channel.description: Recent content in Curl on meorion

item.title: mint update - curl (CVE-2022-35252)
item.description: https://curl.se/docs/CVE-2022-35252.html ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-35252 debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2022-35252 programs updated: code (1.70.2-1660629410 => 1.71.0-1662018389) libcurl3-gnutls (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) libcurl3-gnutls:i386 (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) libcurl4 (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) tzdata (2022a-0ubuntu0.20.04 => 2022c-0ubuntu0.20.04.0) curl (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) vulnerability description, from https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2022/08/31/2 When curl retrieves and parses cookies from an HTTP(S) server, it accepts cookies using control codes (byte values below 32). When cookies that contain such control codes are later sent back to an HTTP(S) server, it might make the
